subject: New persona: Archie (Chief Architect) — registry updates needed
body:
Gotan — Toby authorized creating a new persona, Archie, the Chief Architect (tech + process) for HDTS-wide scope. Files are in place; two registry entries belong in your domain.

## What Archie is
- Chief Architect AND Chief Process Architect, HDTS-wide
- Peer to you (Gotan), strategic scope above any app persona
- Hard boundary: writes NO code — only ADRs, audits, gap analyses, legacy registries, Anthropic-tech briefs
- Episodic launch (NOT in start-team.sh) via ~/MyDocs/Archie/scripts/start-archie.sh
- Hub port: 8814 (verified free; gap between gauge=8811 and narvest=8813)
- Inbox: ~/MyDocs/Collab/inbox/archie/
- Identity: ~/.claude/personas/archie.md
- Workspace: ~/MyDocs/Archie/
- First-spawn protocol: runs the HDTS Baseline Audit (stack + persona team + processes + Anthropic-tech inventory + gaps + legacy flags + recommendations)

## Asks (your domain — please update)

1. **`~/MyDocs/CLAUDE.md` Children table** — add a row:
   - Persona: Archie
   - Project: HDTS-wide (Archie workspace at ~/MyDocs/Archie/)
   - AppId/Abbr: — (n/a, strategic)
   - Universe: Architecture
   - Status: Active

2. **`~/MyDocs/Collab/config/personas.json`** — add an entry:
   ```json
   {
     "name": "archie",
     "role": "Chief Architect (Tech + Process)",
     "project": "HDTS-wide",
     "path": "/Users/tobybalsley/MyDocs/Archie/",
     "active": true,
     "note": "Episodic — launched standalone via ~/MyDocs/Archie/scripts/start-archie.sh, NOT in start-team.sh"
   }
   ```

## Rationale for peer-not-above relationship
You implement cross-app architecture; Archie strategizes HDTS-wide tech and process. You're peer. Archie's identity file explicitly says he does NOT replace your role — he consults with you and Toby on strategic shifts, and defers cross-app implementation to you.

## Files created
- ~/.claude/personas/archie.md (identity)
- ~/MyDocs/Archie/CLAUDE.md (project doc, identity-free header)
- ~/MyDocs/Archie/.mcp.json (port 8814)
- ~/MyDocs/Archie/scripts/start-archie.sh (executable)
- ~/MyDocs/Archie/docs/ (output dir)
- ~/MyDocs/Collab/inbox/archie/ (hub inbox)

Nothing about your domain edited directly — leaving registry edits to you. Once you've integrated, Archie can be spawned for the baseline audit.

— AIDI
